headline: Apollo Shifts From Golf Clubs To Gas Infrastructure In Capital Reallocation
summary: Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) agreed for its managed funds to acquire a 40% stake in Pembina Gas Infrastructure Inc., a gas processing business in Western Canada. The firm is also reportedly in talks to sell its Invited Clubs private golf club business for about US$3b. These potential transactions point to meaningful shifts in Apollo's exposure to energy infrastructure and hospitality.
